programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team discovers a club where hunters pursue human prey deep in the Everglades.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team tries to find a connection between the murders of a truck driver and a woman on his delivery route.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An escaped prisoner takes Natalia hostage and reveals shocking secrets about his crimes.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio must protect a mixed-martial-arts fighter from the guy's brother, a prison escapee.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the death of a college student whose body was found in a hot tub.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio tracks down a mysterious murder suspect, he discovers the man's life is a charade.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the transport plane carrying a fugitive crash-lands, the CSIs learn the criminal is planning more than just an escape.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: The body of a fraternity brother is discovered inside a rival school's mascot uniform; Booth tries to help his brother find a new job.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: Brennan asks Booth to be the father of her child; Stewie Griffin (Seth MacFarlane) offers the couple advice.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: When a body is discovered at a popular nightclub, everyone is a suspect.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: Angela's psychic, Avalon Harmonia (Cyndi Lauper), alerts Brennan and Booth to the presence of a mass grave beneath a fountain.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: Booth and Brennan investigate when a man is murdered for the undisclosed contents of his briefcase; the team looks for alternate funding for Wendell when he loses his scholarship.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: Human remains are found next to a railroad; Cam deals with the stress of being a new parent; Booth tries to keep Cam's stepdaughter in line.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: As darkness covers Midsomer Stanton during a total eclipse of the sun, amateur astronomer Jeremy Harper is killed by a blow to the head with a meteorite. Barnaby and Jones soon discover intrigue, sexual tension and academic rivalry are rife among the star-seeking community.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Harriet Farmer wakes up after being in a coma since the night she tried to elope. Soon afterwards, a killer strikes members of a chess club. Could the attack which left Harriet for dead a year ago be linked to moves on a chess board? And where is her boyfriend Finn?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A woman is crushed to death with a giant round of cheese at the home of the world-famous Midsomer Blue. Secret and controversial plans to modernise the dairy are revealed while rumours about private lives of the parents cause a row at the prestigious local prep school. As other people linked to the dairy meet agonising deaths, long-held secrets start to emerge...

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Midsomer is buzzing with excitement at the arrival of the annual ‘Paramount Dance Extravaganza’. But behind the sequins and smiles are deep running feuds and passions.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Prolific real estate agent Alexander Beauvoisin is murdered in front of a crowd at the unveiling of a new dolls house collection at Midsomer Museum of the family.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The Deddington’s thriving bee Empire has put Granville Norton on the map, but what lengths will they go to to ensure they’re never dethroned…

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Fishermen and women flock to the village of Solomon Gorge desperate to catch a giant fish that is said to lurk in the lake.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: As the Barnabys prepare for Cully's wedding, Lord Fitzroy and Beth Porteous are married in the pretty village of Bledlow. At the lavish reception at Bledlow Hall that follows, however, tragedy strikes - maid of honour Marina Fellowes is found murdered in one of the rooms by some of the guests. With their honeymoon cancelled, the Fitzroys must contend with a police presence in their home, as Barnaby and Jones try to learn more about the family history. It soon becomes clear there are secrets, deception, and an illegtimate son involved in the mystery, which is further complicated when the estate manager is killed by an arrow.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: It's a good day for the Hicks family, as the name of Tommy Hicks - who was executed during World War I for "cowardice and desertion" - is added to the list on Midsomer Parva's war memorial. Tommy's son Lionel and grandson Dave, mayor of Causton and whom Barnaby does not like (owing to dodgy building work by the mayor's company), are thrilled, but the snooty Hammonds are decidedly less pleased. Henry, the patriarch of the Hammond family, is particularly riled by his insalubrious neighbours, and has nurtured a long-running feud with the Hickses. But the evening after a battle re-enactment in the village, Henry is murdered - and Barnaby must delve into the history of the two families to find the killer, discovering a web of fraud, lies, and hidden truths.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones are in Dunstan to investigate the deaths of a reclusive couple. As they try to establish whether Ron and Libby Wilson were murdered or died of natural causes, their attention is drawn to a dispute raging between a local builder and road protesters nearby. When another death occurs, the detectives learn that there are plenty of dark secrets and fierce hostilities in this apparently idyllic village. Will Jack Purdy's quick temper lead to violence? How far would the protesters go to prevent the bypass being built? And do current events somehow relate to the death of Michael Wilson many years earlier?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When the body of Londoner Charlie Finleyson is discovered in woodland near Midsomer Sonning, Barnaby and Jones find themselves investigating employees at local Midsomer Life magazine. It turns out the dead man was married to the ex-wife of Guy Sandys, the wealthy owner of the publication. As the detectives become aware of a feud between Guy and the proprietor of the Morecroft Hotel, tensions are also heating up between the locals and visiting Londoners. Soon Barnaby and Jones find themselves to trying to piece together the truth about the murder, and learn that someone might be trying to conceal something in their past.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a pub landlady is crushed to death during a magic show in Midsomer Oaks, Barnaby and Nelson uncover conflict between the village church and ancient pagan traditions. Is famous magician Gideon Latimer to blame or is he the target?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones are forced to take part in a team building exercise and Tom has plenty of problems dealing with the young, new, acting Chief Superintendent, John Cotton (Nick Fletcher). Following an explosion in a truck that had been stored in a truck depot, a body is soon discovered in a nearby lake, which turns out to be Alec Grainger, who had been seen arguing with James Parkes (Joseph Millson), the son of Colonel Matt Parkes (Tim Pigott-Smith). James appears to be involved in shady business deals and is blamed by his grandmother Caroline Halsey (Judy Parfitt) - and others - for the suicide of a woman he got pregnant two years before. Barnaby and Jones find themselves delving into a mixture of fraud, smuggling, and lies, trying to piece together the truth.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When two couples vanish into thin air in the village of Monks Barton, Barnaby and Jones hear rumours of haunted woods and witchcraft. Barnaby remains sceptical of this, even when an unidentified body is found in a shallow grave and the missing start turning up dead. He soon has to determine if ghosts, criminals, or something else, is behind the abductions and murders.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The residents of Milton Cross, a feudal estate with a church, farms, houses and acres of land, depend on lord of the manor Edward Milton for their livelihoods. But when Sonia Woodley is stabbed in the churchyard two years after the death of her abusive husband Gerald, Barnaby and Jones investigate, trying to work out who killed her. It soon becomes clear someone took a pair of tailor scissors to do the deed, but who amongst the villagers could have done so, is unclear, and the investigation is complicated, when the pair learn the local Anglican priest, the parish vicar, had received a letter from Sonia. When he himself is killed, the pair believe something in the letter may be key to solving the mystery.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby is not convinced about Mayor David Hicks' plans to revive an annual trip to Brighton, suspecting his proposal to buy coastal land there, is rather a fraudulent scheme. Naturally, he joins the trip, but during their time in Brighton, a hated property developer (Tim McInnerny) is beheaded on a ghost house ride, prompting Barnaby to team up with his cousin to determine whether the developer's renters, the mayor, a gloomy reverend (Mark Gatiss), or the lady of a large estate are responsible, and soon discovers a hotbed of jealously, debt, lies and more, conceal a far darker secret.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Ford Florey is a town with a Wild West Society and many grudges. During a Wild West show at the local faire, the witch on the 'Dunk the Witch' stall is well and truly dunked but laughter soon turns to horror when she doesn't get up and the water in the tank starts to turn red. Barnaby and Jones need to be quick on the draw to track down the murderer, and soon begin to wonder whether a dispute over land was the motive, or something far more sinister, especially when more people are killed, with methods linked to the Wild West.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: On a dark night in the village of March Magna, Barnaby's wife Joyce swerves her car and narrowly misses a shadowy figure in the road - or so she thinks, when later that night a body is discovered in the old cemetery. The victim was a member of the council who was strange and weird, but someone seemed to have quite a grudge on him, and so Barnaby and Jones delve into his background, and the village, attempting to determine who might have wanted him dead, finding ghosts, grudges, and more beneath the village's surface.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Piano student Zoe Stock has won a place at the Devington Manor Winter School led by internationally renowned musician, Sir Michael Fielding (James Fox). Yet when she is there, things become mysterious when from the river bank in the grounds of the manor she sees a woman jump from the bridge and disappear underwater. When Barnaby and Jones start investigating the possible drowning, they discover unsavoury connections to the past that could prove lethal 20 years later, especially when someone attempts to kill. It isn't long, before murder does occur, and the detectives attempt to fathom what occurred in the drowning, and the present day murders.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Midsomer Morchard's very own boxer, John Kinsella, wins a world title in New York, the success seems to be a joyous time for all, until murder rears its ugly head. When a local solicitor is found dead by his assistant and Kinsella's manager, Barnaby attempts to determine what is going on, and soon discover issues with inheritance, affairs, anger, and gambling to make matters difficult. Meanwhile Kinsella's trainer Teddy Molloy (Phil Daniels) has his own hidden agenda. When a re-enactment of a Victorian boxing match gets heated, and Kinsella's manager is found dead in his home's gym, the pair attempt to determine who is responsible, although Barnaby's judgement seems to be clouded on this one.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A planning dispute turns to murder, after a leading light in the Midsomer Conservation Society suspects her neighbours are involved in a money-making development scam. Political wrangling, burglaries and sexual liaisons abound in picturesque Great Pelfe - but when a member of the possible scam is themselves murdered, Barnaby wonders what is truly going on behind the scenes of an important by-election.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby reluctantly accompanies Joyce on a spa weekend to Swavely Manor. But as he attempts to de-stress, a woman is found dead in the flotation chamber. He abandons his treatment to investigate, but his personal worries are never far away as he contemplates his future, while trying to determine if an argument between the spa's owners and their neighbours is the motive, or something else.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When wealthy landowner Gregory Lancaster's body goes missing on the night of his death, a sinister web of secrets and lies is exposed in the village of Little Malton. DCI Barnaby, DS Nelson and new Forensic Pathologist Kam Karimore are drawn into a macabre world of body-snatching as they seek to identify the villain.

programme.title: Dalziel and Pascoe
programme.desc: When rugby star's wife is found murdered at her Yorkshire home, everyone is under suspicion.

programme.title: Dalziel and Pascoe
programme.desc: When a corpse is disinterred at Holm Coltram University, campus becomes headquarters for Dalziel and Pascoe.

programme.title: Dalziel and Pascoe
programme.desc: When Peter Pascoe and Ellie Soper take the plunge and get married, Dalziel has a holiday of his own.

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.desc: An investigation into the death of a cricketer soon uncovers his complex personal life.

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.desc: The kidnap of a secret love child proves to be Lynley's most politically sensitive case.

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.desc: Lynley's engagement celebrations are overshadowed by a murder in the nearby village.

programme.title: The Inspector Lynley Mysteries
programme.desc: Lynley's engagement celebrations are overshadowed by a murder in the nearby village.

programme.title: The Hound of the Baskervilles (1982)
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and Dr Watson investigate a mysterious death in Devonshire.

programme.title: The Hound of the Baskervilles (1982)
programme.desc: Sherlock realises that his client is being followed by a mysterious danger.

programme.title: The Hound of the Baskervilles (1982)
programme.desc: Is the Baskervilles' butler working against his employers?

programme.title: The Hound of the Baskervilles (1982)
programme.desc: Has the curse of the Baskervilles claimed another victim?

programme.title: Miss Marple
programme.desc: One morning, Mary the maid discovers a dead body in the library of Gossington Hall.

programme.title: Miss Marple
programme.desc: When a second body is found, Miss Marple is convinced that the two murders are connected.

programme.title: Miss Marple
programme.desc: The police arrest a man on suspicion of murder, but Miss Marple has other ideas.

programme.title: Miss Marple

programme.title: Marilyn, Misunderstood

programme.title: Lucille Ball: We Love Lucy
programme.desc: This documentary film looks at the trail-blazing life of Lucille Ball and shows why the comedic legend was everyone's favorite redhead.

programme.title: Elizabeth Montgomery: A Bewitched Life
programme.desc: Among the most enduring TV sitcoms of all time, Bewitched remains beloved nearly sixty years after its debut. The series lead, Elizabeth Montgomery, was a complex, strong-willed woman whose life and career became an ongoing quest for love and recognition she never received from her movie star father. Bewitched became one of television's biggest hits during the turbulent 1960s, a time that was symbolic of the series' behind-the-scenes turmoil.

programme.title: Fortune Fights
programme.desc: The family of Casey Kasem fights over his estimated net worth of $80 million during his final years.

programme.title: Life, Death & Money

programme.title: Fortune Fights
programme.desc: The reign of attorney and Los Angeles Clippers owner Donald Sterling comes crashing down after a racist rant, and he is banned from the NBA.

programme.title: Autopsy: The Last Hours of...
programme.desc: Walt Disney was the father of movie-length animation and creator of some of the most loved and recognized characters in the world; on Dec. 15, 1966, Walt Disney died in a Burbank hospital when he was 65 years old.

programme.title: Siegfried & Roy: The Original Tiger Kings
programme.desc: At the height of their fame, groundbreaking magicians Siegfried & Roy were the highest-paid entertainers in Las Vegas history, globally renowned for blending magic with their astonishing killer-cat interactions. Millions of tickets were sold, billions of dollars were made, and tiger mania swept the nation. But life in the ultra-exotic world of Siegfried & Roy may not have always been what it seemed, as the magicians lived by the art of illusion off stage as well-painstakingly crafting myths about their relationships with their tigers and even with each other. Then after building that empire based on smoke, mirrors and giant cats, Siegfried & Roy's longstanding world of illusions was destroyed by one fateful onstage encounter with an angry tiger in front of a sold-out audience. That horrifying act of violence shocked the world, unleashed a torrent of wild conspiracy theories, and forever redefined the magicians' legacy.

programme.title: John Wayne: Cowboys & Demons
programme.desc: John Wayne was an actor, a legend, and an embodiment of America itself; he also spent much of his life quietly tormented, desperately trying to measure up to the towering Hollywood persona he had crafted.

programme.title: Clint Eastwood: Hollywood Outlaw
programme.desc: Film clips and interviews with biographers and colleagues chart the prolific, six-decade career of maverick actor-director Clint Eastwood.

programme.desc: Block Management is one of the keys to great hunting in Montana but the rules are set. If you are going to break them the Wardens will be there to hold you accountable.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Warden Joe Kambic investigates an illegal buck report. Warden Rick Smauch faces a fire emergency, and Bryan Golie braves winter weather to patrol.

programme.title: United 93: The Real Story
programme.desc: The events on board the ill-fated United Airlines Flight 93; hijacked as part of the 9/11 attack, the terrorists were on a suicide mission to crash the plane into a Washington, D.C., target.

programme.title: The Real Story Of...
programme.desc: In 2014 the movie American Sniper was released. Directed by Clint Eastwood, this told the story of famed sniper Chris Kyle, a US Navy Seal who racked up 160 confirmed kills in Iraq. Now we examine the truth behind the Chris Kyle legend.

programme.title: Most Shocking
programme.desc: An inquisitive reporter gets hard-hitting answers; masked thugs storm a pool hall; a bad girl beats down her rival but sparks a battle with a new enemy.

programme.title: Most Shocking
programme.desc: Wild chases and crashes; a couple try to flee the law; a sidecar racer goes AWOL; a racing coupe flips eight times.

programme.title: Most Shocking
programme.desc: A naked partier gets trampled by a bull; prostitutes do battle; police pursue college coeds streaking through city streets.

programme.title: On Patrol: Live - Dupe
programme.desc: Berkeley County, S.C., officers repeatedly contact gathering street racers; officers in Clayton County, Ga., investigate a homicide at a convenience store; Knox County, Tenn., officers apprehend two people for DUI during one traffic stop.

programme.title: On Patrol: Live - Dupe
programme.desc: Lee County, Fla., officers respond to a reported home invasion; officers in Las Vegas investigate brothers fighting; Monroe County, La., officers are called to a fight at a birthday party; officers in Daytona Beach, Fla., chase a man with a gun.

programme.desc: Hip Hop is a cultural movement that incorporates different elements of art and one of the most popular genres of music. Hip Hop�s influence has shaped styles, entertainment, and continues to be a global phenomenon impacting old and new generations.

programme.title: Uncensored
programme.desc: When you�re dealing with over-the-top personalities, you�re bound to have some controversial moments. Find out the tea when we re-live some of the most scandalous moments ever confessed from NeNe Leaks, LisaRaye McCoy, Charlamagne The God, Le�Andria Johnson, Lamar Odom and more.

programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: Shirley Murdock is that rare singer-songwriter who is revered by fans of pop, R&B, dance music and gospel. But at the height of her career, an unthinkable tragedy tested her fortitude and her faith.

programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: Chuckii Booker rose to fame in the late 80s as one of R&B's top crooners! But after just a few years, the pressures of stardom led Chuckii to abandon his solo career.

programme.title: Media
programme.desc: Jones Universal Media Productions (JUMP) has been dominating the national urban media scene for years. The Jones family is doing everything they can to put a stop to whoever is trying to tear them apart.

programme.title: The Rickey Smiley Show
programme.desc: During the Morning show Rickey announces it�s time for the annual fundraiser athis church. To make things different this year Bernice coaxes Rickey into being acelebrity judge on the first annual Gospel Idol. Knowing that Rickey is involved asponsor donates a top prize of $10,000 and a recording contract. Now everyonecomes out of the woodworks, claiming to have talent. The kids rehearse at thehouse hoping to get on. Even Maurice wants to dust off his old rap skills. JoeWillie and the Deuteronomaires perform, along with Kenny, Aunt Sylvia and ahost of other talented and not so talented people. What makes this show specialis it won�t be like your typical talent show. It will be shot like the early stages ofAmerican Idol where our celebrity judges (Rickey included) will decide who goesto the next round. Just like Randy, Paula and Simon, our judges will fightamongst each other and possibly with the talent they deny.

programme.title: The Rickey Smiley Show
programme.desc: Brandon�s tries to become popular by befriending a highly recruited basketballplayer that attends his school. The player is accused by the school of cheating onhis college entrance exam and is suspended from school. The friend says he isinnocent and actually accuses the school of racism for questioning hisintelligence. The story takes on national headlines. Brandon says that he is surebeyond a shadow of a doubt about his new friend�s innocence and in an effort toimpress him, asks if Rickey will have his the player on his morning show to talkabout the injustice and possibly clear his friend�s name which Rickey does. Laterevidence comes out that the player really did cheat on the exam and was justusing Brandon to get on his dad�s show. A very disappointed Brandon tells Rickeywho talks to him about the importance of integrity.B STORYDe�anna accidentally breaks one of Rickey�s trophies and has to get it fixed beforeany one finds out. De�anna pieces it together with glue. Aaron says it still looksbad. Aunt Sylvia is cleaning around and accidentally bumps it. When shecatches it, it crumbles in her hand. Now Aunt Sylvia thinks she broke it. De�annacontinues to let her think it so that she can go to a party this weekend. She hasto convince Aaron to keep his mouth shut. At the end, De�anna confesses to AuntSylvia and when Rickey knocks the trophy over, Aunt Sylvia and De�anna decideto keep it to themselves.

programme.title: Hollywood Divas
programme.desc: When Paula misses the final production meeting, Elise prods the group to take unfinished business into their own hands. Also, with shooting under way, Countess's elective surgery threatens to derail the Divas' indie project completely.

programme.title: Hollywood Divas
programme.desc: On the final day of production, Countess's participation in the film is still in question. Also, Paula's sudden departure from set leaves Elise hanging. Finally, a bonfire chat takes a dark turn as blame is thrown and the Divas resolve old issues.

programme.title: Asking For A Friend
programme.desc: Bombshell besties Chrisy and Charritta just might be too darn fly for the ATL dating pool. Can these voluptuous vixens help each other find a man who will get them out of the dating rat race?

programme.title: Asking For A Friend
programme.desc: Joe, a serial dater, has yet to find that special someone. Noel just got out of a relationship and is back to being single. These two best buds of twenty years are both looking for �the one�. Will they truly know what the other needs to win at love?

programme.title: Jean of The Joneses
programme.desc: Chaos ensues after the estranged patriarch of the Jones family dies on their doorstep. When the paramedic who answers their 911 call tried to win over acerbic Jean Jones, his attempts are disrupted by old conflicts that come to a boil at the funeral.

programme.title: Uncensored
programme.desc: Black women face challenges daily and still manage to make things happen. Black Girl Magic celebrates the beauty, power, accomplishments, and strength of some of our favorite UNCNSRD women

programme.title: Uncensored
programme.desc: If you don’t have a seat at the table, sometimes you have to create your own. Black Hollywood has been making major contributions to TV and film for decades, whether recognized or not, and it’s not stopping any time soon

programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: Candi Staton is known as The Queen of Southern Soul, thanks to a string of hits, most notably the disco groove �Young Hearts Run Free.� But behind the success, Candi was fighting for her life.

programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: The Clark Sisters � these 2nd generation gospel stars broke down gospel/secular barriers for artists such as the Winans and Kirk Franklin, but their own personal demons, struggles within the family and backlash from the most traditional in the church community kept them from becoming the crossover gospel household names they were destined to become.

programme.title: Ringside
programme.desc: Ringside follows the road leading up to the biggest fight of the year between Spencer "Timber" Collier (Allen Maldonado) and Jaxon Holley (Tyler Lepley). Timber defends his title against Jaxon who is undefeated as he tries to navigate a difficult personal life that includes caring for his troubled sister and brother.

programme.title: The Rickey Smiley Show
programme.desc: Rickey�s ex wife, Monica returns home after losing her big case in LA. She isdepressed about the case and spends more time with the kids in order to cheerherself up. She tells Rickey that she has missed the kids and wants to assumecustody. She is shocked when Rickey says no. De�anna overhears this andthinks Rickey is being unfair. Rickey thinks De�anna just wants to spend moretime with her mom because Monica doesn�t have as many rules as he does and isalways buying them things out of guilt. He reminds her that the kids are on agood schedule, doing well and have adjusted to life as it is. He also tells Monicashe can visit when ever and as often as she wants. That�s not good enough for hershe wants the kids to live with her. This causes a huge fight between the formercouple, resulting in Monica telling Rickey that she�s suing for full custody.

programme.title: The Rickey Smiley Show
programme.desc: After losing Kenny and having Maurice as his producer, who keeps messing up, Rickey realizes how much he needs Kenny. So Rickey goes to rescue Kenny from his contract at Ray's radio station.

programme.title: The Rickey Smiley Show
programme.desc: During the Morning show Rickey announces it�s time for the annual fundraiser athis church. To make things different this year Bernice coaxes Rickey into being acelebrity judge on the first annual Gospel Idol. Knowing that Rickey is involved asponsor donates a top prize of $10,000 and a recording contract. Now everyonecomes out of the woodworks, claiming to have talent. The kids rehearse at thehouse hoping to get on. Even Maurice wants to dust off his old rap skills. JoeWillie and the Deuteronomaires perform, along with Kenny, Aunt Sylvia and ahost of other talented and not so talented people. What makes this show specialis it won�t be like your typical talent show. It will be shot like the early stages ofAmerican Idol where our celebrity judges (Rickey included) will decide who goesto the next round. Just like Randy, Paula and Simon, our judges will fightamongst each other and possibly with the talent they deny.

programme.title: The Rickey Smiley Show
programme.desc: Brandon�s tries to become popular by befriending a highly recruited basketballplayer that attends his school. The player is accused by the school of cheating onhis college entrance exam and is suspended from school. The friend says he isinnocent and actually accuses the school of racism for questioning hisintelligence. The story takes on national headlines. Brandon says that he is surebeyond a shadow of a doubt about his new friend�s innocence and in an effort toimpress him, asks if Rickey will have his the player on his morning show to talkabout the injustice and possibly clear his friend�s name which Rickey does. Laterevidence comes out that the player really did cheat on the exam and was justusing Brandon to get on his dad�s show. A very disappointed Brandon tells Rickeywho talks to him about the importance of integrity.B STORYDe�anna accidentally breaks one of Rickey�s trophies and has to get it fixed beforeany one finds out. De�anna pieces it together with glue. Aaron says it still looksbad. Aunt Sylvia is cleaning around and accidentally bumps it. When shecatches it, it crumbles in her hand. Now Aunt Sylvia thinks she broke it. De�annacontinues to let her think it so that she can go to a party this weekend. She hasto convince Aaron to keep his mouth shut. At the end, De�anna confesses to AuntSylvia and when Rickey knocks the trophy over, Aunt Sylvia and De�anna decideto keep it to themselves.

programme.desc: Southern rapper Master P grows his "No Limit" brand to one of the most successful independent labels in the music industry, emerging a millionaire before the age of 30 thanks to his emphasis on ownership, generational wealth, and philanthropy.

programme.title: Uncensored
programme.desc: Black women face challenges daily and still manage to make things happen. Black Girl Magic celebrates the beauty, power, accomplishments, and strength of some of our favorite UNCNSRD women

programme.title: Uncensored
programme.desc: If you don’t have a seat at the table, sometimes you have to create your own. Black Hollywood has been making major contributions to TV and film for decades, whether recognized or not, and it’s not stopping any time soon

programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: Candi Staton is known as The Queen of Southern Soul, thanks to a string of hits, most notably the disco groove �Young Hearts Run Free.� But behind the success, Candi was fighting for her life.

programme.title: Unsung
programme.desc: The Clark Sisters � these 2nd generation gospel stars broke down gospel/secular barriers for artists such as the Winans and Kirk Franklin, but their own personal demons, struggles within the family and backlash from the most traditional in the church community kept them from becoming the crossover gospel household names they were destined to become.

programme.title: Ringside
programme.desc: Ringside follows the road leading up to the biggest fight of the year between Spencer "Timber" Collier (Allen Maldonado) and Jaxon Holley (Tyler Lepley). Timber defends his title against Jaxon who is undefeated as he tries to navigate a difficult personal life that includes caring for his troubled sister and brother.

programme.desc: NASCAR driver Greg Biffle asks Rick to restore his 1970s Montesa motorcycle; 1950s Kidillac.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Rick and his team must overhaul a 1900s chemical cart; Rick's brother Ron and son Tyler find a 1940s motorized surfboard.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: A 1940s Japanese Maruishi bicycle pedals into the shop; the crew restores a 1940s Chiclet vending machine.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: A client brings in his father's 1954 Bantam tractor; a client brings in an early 1900s air brake tester for trains.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Rick Harrison arrives at the shop looking for a birthday present for his son.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: A client brings in a rare British motorcycle from the 1950s; the team puts in their two cents on a 1940s Accurate Weight penny scale.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Rick attempts to restore a 1960s three-wheeled Marketeer Golf Cart for the Pawn Stars; a customer drops off an extremely rare Hopalong Cassidy bicycle from the 1950s.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Dale discovers the engine from a super rare 1940 Harley-Davidson WLD in a box of seemingly random parts; Steve turns a 1959 Cadillac tailfin into a custom couch; Bodie and his team restore a 1963 Ford Galaxie back to its former race code glory.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Andy gets to work on an odd kit car that's part VW bug, part Delorean and part motorcycle; Dale builds a custom Harley for a customer looking to connect to his past.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Chris is tested on a Dale Drake scooter that arrives in pieces; a suit of armor is brought in for a restoration.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny continues his El Caminos love affair with a 1975 beauty.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Rock Legend Alice Cooper left his prized Avanti in The Count's hands, and now, he's back to get it! Will Alice like what Danny and the crew have done?

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: On this hour-long episode Danny is hosting a huge car show and needs to restore a '73 boat-tail Riviera to be the main attraction.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny and the boys give away a perfect hot rod at the annual Rockabilly Reunion at Lake Havasu. Later, a lady biker stuns the boys.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny gets sidetracked by a curious lady in a hot pink Beetle while trying to score a classic Ford Galaxie.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny takes on a Route 66-inspired Chevy for the famed highway's biggest fan, and later teams up with his good buddy, American Restoration's Rick Dale.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny buys a '78 Lincoln with some serious fire damage, but it's only when he takes it apart does he learn how bad it is.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: A Casino VIP visits Count's Kustoms to commission a hi-end chopper build for a huge blackjack bonus prize.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: The shop agrees to build a brave father a hot rod wheelchair, and Danny gets stuck in a bind when a pink car project doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: When Counts Kustom's master painter Ryan decides to paint his own van, the entire crew buckles in for a bumpy ride.

programme.desc: Across logging country, the final push begins. At Papac, Joe Linderborg's reign on the yarder has everyone running scared.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: It's the final week of Ax Men, the clock counts down as tempers heat up.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Papac returns as reigning king of the mountain; a gruesome accident puts Shelby Stanga dead in the water; a new yarder company joins the competition.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Shelby Stanga is hired to remove a log from private property; infighting reaches a fever pitch at S&S Aqua Logging; a familiar face returns to Papac; Gabe Rygaard takes Dave out cutting.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Jimmy Smith is smitten with his new assistant; Uncle Buck and Swilley push their equipment to the breaking point; Shelby Stanga scouts his newest log order; Big Gun Logging faces an uncertain future when Levi Brown goes to the hospital.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: A yarder operator at Papac Alaska walks off in the middle of the day; Swilley's determination to beat S&S in the Suwannee River Log Off leads to a life threatening mistake; Big Gun Logging loses control of the Ole Keasy site.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Start-up outfit Big Gun Logging hits a snag as their deadline approaches; Buck & Swilley make a run for the lead in the log-off; Jimmy deals with a crew crisis; Shelby Stanga enlists the help of a voodoo team.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Shelby Stanga and a massive tree fight to the death; the bad blood between Dave and Fernando boils over; two of Papac's machines get tangled up; Buck and Swilley raise the stakes; Siderius Logging gambles on life and limb.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Shelby Stanga takes his newest assistant loggin' and froggin'; Travis earns his stripes when he's forced into a deadly situation; S&S hits bottom, then hits gold. In Washington; Joe lets loose.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Big Gun Logging faces sheer rock cliffs and a new crop of greenhorns; a widow-maker threatens to take out Coatsy; a gamble gets out of control; Jimmy and James hit rock bottom.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Jimmy and James Smith go to an anger management counselor; Gabe Rygaard unveils a bold new plan to run two yarders on the same site; one of Big Gun's greenhorns faces the end of the line; Shelby takes on an assistant who puts him in his place.

programme.desc: Shelby and cousin Belinda are under the gun to find a huge Cypress; S&S hires a new diver but says goodbye to an old one; the cowboys of Siderius break in their greenhorn.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: While combing through a mind-blowing collection, Mike stares down the headlights of a rare Ford; the guys pick a Tennessee home hiding a big secret.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Flying solo in Northern Iowa, Mike comes across the "Goat Man" and combs through his amazing, hidden-away property of junk-filled fields and buses. An Illinois couple's home proves to be a collector's paradise.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Frank and Dave's Florida road trip gets stranger at every turn, from a creepy collection of kitsch to a tugboat that's home to a captain and his unusual pet; back in Iowa, Mike readies the new shop for its grand opening.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Frank spots an alien spaceship emerging from an Airstream trailer; Mike's honest approach wins over a tough-as-nails negotiator; Danielle prepares to unveil her secret renovation project.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Cheap Trick guitarist Rick Nielsen opens the doors to his private rock'n'roll warehouse; Mike and Frank scour a log cabin village museum and go nuts for some cast iron erotica; John's Wisconsin property is packed with great stuff.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: It's all rock 'n' roll as the guys tackle the painstaking preservation of Aerosmith's original tour van; star-struck Frank picks one of his teen idols.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike's hurt his back but can't afford time off to recuperate. The guys dive into a 92-year-old Iowa farmer's unbelievable collection but make a huge mistake in the process.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank hit a down and dirty old-school pick in Illinois while Danielle and Robbie enjoy a high-speed joyride in a one-of-a-kind rat rod.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank are stunned by a house with storefronts frozen in time, containing a bounty of new-old stock and a secret bootlegging basement.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank stumble across an amazing family junkyard in Maryland. Frank offers big money for a 1939 Plymouth coupe but the collector doesn't seem to want to part with it.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank have their hands full with a high-strung collector; Danielle lands in New York City for a high-stakes auction of rock 'n' roll memorabilia.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys drive clear to England where they haggle over an iconic red phone booth; a British eccentric's garage is packed with motorized treasures; the guys excavate a wall of junk; Mike makes a mammoth bid on an ultra-rare motorbike.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Robbie uncover a hidden stash of awesome motorcycle relics at a Colorado property littered with massive man-mobiles.

programme.desc: While hunting for collectables in Central Iowa, Mike and Frank meet 88-year-old WWII veteran Leland and buy the Japanese sword he brought back from the war.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase volunteers to take the Duck Commander RV out on pick up, but neglects to mention to Willie, he's taking Si, Martin and Jep along for a road trip.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase and Si embark on a turkey hunt for the annual Robertson men vs. Robertson women cook-off to create a feast of fresh wild game. With Phil's discerning palate as judge, the teams pull out all of the stops.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: A compilation of the best scenes from all 11 seasons of A&E's hit series Duck Dynasty.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: A compilation of the best scenes from all 11 seasons of A&E's hit series Duck Dynasty.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: It's all hands on deck for the Duckmen when an old high school nemesis challenges them to a good old fashion race... at the local lawn mower competition. But Willie and the guys soon find out that this sport is nothing short of high octane.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: With Sadie's (Willie's daughter) driver's license test fast approaching, she finds herself in dire need of lessons.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: After Willie's son (John Luke) leaves Willie's pickup in the driveway with a bone-dry gas tank, Willie and Korie decide that it's time to get the kid his own car.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Duck Commander assembly room gets an unexpected shakeup when a disgruntled Si decides to quit his job. But when Willie hires a replacement that clashes with the duck call room, Jase and the guys quickly become equally miserable at work. Meanwhile, Si turns to Phil for work out on the land turning a routine levee repair into a complete disaster.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie finds his office in shambles and alerts the authorities that the warehouse has had a break in. But soon Willie discovers that the culprit was his brother Jase, who needed supplies for an early morning frog hunt.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When a heat wave envelops West Monroe the air conditioning unit at the Duck Commander warehouse goes down, turning the duck call assembly room into a boiling sweatshop.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: After Korie decides the junk piles in the Duck Commander warehouse are beginning to reach critical mass, she calls on Willie and the guys to do a little company spring-cleaning. But the discovery of an old Ping-Pong table deep within the clutter quickly turns the chore into an all day table tennis tournament. Meanwhile, Uncle Si realizes that he's many years overdue for an appointment with the local eye doctor and ventures out for some new glasses.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: After attending a local radio show as a guest, Willie sees an opportunity to host a show of his own. When the station gives him the opportunity, Willie makes the mistake of bringing Uncle Si on the air with him.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Jase, Si and the guys from the duck call room take a field trip to a brand new local donut shop and quickly find out who amongst them can eat the most delicious treats.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie receives a special gift from a Japanese business associate - a "priceless" samurai sword, which Willie keeps out of the hands of Jase and the guys.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie pushes his work force too far after implementing new "motivational work tactics," and the guys rise up against him and go on strike.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When NASCAR sensation Clint Bowyer pays a visit to the Duck Commander warehouse, Willie and the guys are fired up to spend the day hanging out with the professional racecar driver. But too much enthusiasm about the celebrity's mode of transportation turns into a drag race showdown between Willie and Clint. Phil and Si have their hands full fixing Ms. Kay's barbecue when a trip to the outdoor grill store turns disastrous.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: It's Willie's turn to play Santa Claus at the local church this year but Uncle Si crashes the party and the event goes south in a hurry. Meanwhile, the family gathers at Phil and Miss Kay's house to celebrate the holidays in true redneck fashion.

But too much enthusiasm about the celebrity's mode of transportation turns into a drag race showdown between Willie and Clint. Phil and Si have their hands full fixing Ms. Kay's barbecue when a trip to the outdoor grill store turns disastrous.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: It's Willie's turn to play Santa Claus at the local church this year but Uncle Si crashes the party and the event goes south in a hurry. Meanwhile, the family gathers at Phil and Miss Kay's house to celebrate the holidays in true redneck fashion.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Tomorrow is the opening day of Duck Season and the men are carrying on their tradition of camping on the Robertson Land the night before... including Willie.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Gearing up for his high school reunion, Willie realizes that he could stand to lose a few pounds. Jase and Korie set out to help him drop some weight and the strenuous battle of man-versus-waistline begins.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The guys learn from Willie that John Luke is going through his first break up. In order to make him feel better the men decide to take John Luke hunting for nutria, and impart their relationship wisdom.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When the warehouse guys new office pet (a lizard) escapes, they try all they can in order to catch the wily reptile. Proving impossible, the guys finally decide to bring in the big guns to help trap it--Mr. Phil Robertson.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: With Willie out-of-town, the guys decide to flake off work and leave to brush up the duck blinds on the Robertson land. While out, Si believes he spots what he thinks is the infamous "Black Panther,"

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie and Jase invite Korie and Missy along on a deer hunt because they believe their wives have become too "city."

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: During Duck Commander's "Casino Night" party for the sale of their 5 millionth duck call, Si Robertson wins the grand prize of $2000 and decides to buy a massage chair for the duck call room.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Sadie, has a homecoming dance coming up, but Willie doesn't approve of her dress selection. Willie decides to take Sadie out to find her a new "appropriate" dress.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Though Jase lost his wedding ring long ago, Missy decides it's time for Jase to replace it with a new one. When Jase is duck hunting, once again, he loses the ring and is forced to come up with a game plan of how to approach and appease Missy.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Duck Commander team is invited to unveil a wing of the local Bass Pro shop that will feature their products.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie calls the team into work on a Saturday afternoon for an HR training session, but the seminar quickly dissolves from unproductive to complete disaster.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie's suspicious behavior from dying his beard to buying a new motorcycle, makes Jase come to the conclusion that Willie is having a mid-life crisis. Jase's help turns into a competition amongst the Robertson brothers to see who is most fit.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: After all their hard work, Willie decides to take the entire Robertson clan on a family vacation to Hawaii.

programme.desc: A phase-three storm hammers Atigun Pass; Alex hits a whiteout coming from Prudhoe; Hugh and Jack hatch a plan to keep the weather from hurting their paychecks; Ray and Lisa make their own plans to keep the loads moving.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Jack Jesse rushes to save an Alaskan town with an emergency fuel delivery, but a blinding storm stops him cold on the thin ice of the frozen river road to Nuiqsut.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The truckers and their rigs are running ragged as they race to pull in the last loads. Lisa can't get out of the Carlile yard in Fairbanks.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: As the final 72 hours of the Ice Road season tick away, legendary driver George Spears calls it a career, Lisa Kelly makes a harrowing 300-mile run with no brakes.

programme.desc: Failing trailer brakes and trash talk over the CB threaten to derail Lisa's comeback.

programme.desc: The pressure on the drivers builds as the temperatures plunge to 55 below; Jack gets into it with a southbound driver; Hugh gets an earful from an American driver; Alex picks up a hitchhiker; Ray takes on Atigun Pass.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: When an avalanche strikes, Jack is stranded and left helpless as he watches the DOT clean up the carnage.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Lisa tackles the most dangerous haul of the season, trucking a multi-million dollar, 100 ton load across the entire state of Alaska.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: It's chaos on the Dalton when a truck flips off the road and smashes into a tree.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Jack Jesse must survive the arctic wilderness and cross a frozen river alone to reach the isolated town of Bettles; Lisa Kelly is back in action but the slippery slopes of the Dalton will make her road to redemption a dangerous one.

programme.desc: Dalton rookie Ray Veilleux drives into a trucker's worst nightmare when he's distracted for a split-second.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When a stripper goes on the lam, Dog has to bring her in--it's a tough job but somebody has to do it. Thankfully for the team, Lady Luck is presiding over the posse tonight.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Leland learns that one of his clients with a reputation for stealing has lost her co-signer and could be ready to run, Dog and the crew hop a plane to the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa's wedding is only three days away, but Dog is thinking about bounties, not bouquets. A hot jump has comes in and Dog wants to go on the hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog shows his love of justice and children in this poignant episode. He begins by giving encouragement to a group of handicapped children and making them honorary members of his posse.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team begin their day by judging the local elementary school's talent show, where they declare all the kids to be winners.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog answers two very different calls for help from women. In the first case, he helps Leland protect Maria, who's being threatened by her violent husband.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog thinks he's got an average day of bounty hunting ahead of him, but he couldn't be more wrong. Beth calls a client, Daphne, whose bond they have to revoke and makes a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows very little about Peter, but what he does know, he doesn't like! Not only is he currently facing two counts of second degree sexual assault, he's racked up numerous restraining orders over the years.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Beth returns to the compound on the Big Island she finds a damaged SUV and two possible culprits--Dog or Justin. Pressed by Beth, Dog offers a third option. The perpetrators are Hawaii's mythical mischief makers--the Menehune!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's the day before Valentine's Day and love is in the air at Da Kine Bail Bonds--but not for Tapi who has failed to appear in court on theft charges. Dog's plan is to have Leland knock on Tapi's door with a Valentine's gift to draw her out.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the local cops put out an APB for a client with a checked past, Dog springs into action. With the aid of the runner's girlfriend the posse heads out to bring him in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team really have their hands full when they go after a tough guy named Nunu, who leads them on a chase through apartment complexes and a shopping mall before he's finally captured. But Dog is charmed by Nunu's unquenchable

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team must deal with misleading informants, belligerent boaters, and angry drunks when they go after Kimberly, a traffic offender with over 20 violations. And if that isn't enough, Dog has another problem -- Duane Lee is sick.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the team hunts for Steven, a fugitive with a history of domestic abuse, they seek help from his girlfriend, who's been a victim of his abuse. Meanwhile, Beth trains for a 5K race to help raise awareness about domestic abuse.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been raining for days and the team is going a little stir crazy. Dog however has the cure--a good hunt. Maui has failed to appear on a drug charge and the team has just one lead.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to help two of his bondsmen buddies, Dave "Red" Widhelm and "Downtown" Bobby Brown. First up is Red, who has a client named Alvin who failed to appear on a $20,000 bond with charges of drug possession and distribution pending.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The team is still in Colorado, and today Dog starts his day by to giving his kids and crew a sample of their western heritage by taking them horseback riding. This hunt takes Dog back to his old stomping grounds in Denver.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The team is still in Colorado, and today Dog starts his day by to giving his kids and crew a sample of their western heritage by taking them horseback riding. This hunt takes Dog back to his old stomping grounds in Denver.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has a big problem. Patty Estabilio has jumped a $15,000 bail bond and disappeared into Hawaii's underworld. Kissing the kids good night, Dog and Beth, with Tim and Leland at their side, plunge into a drug-infused netherworld.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Both brother Tim and fellow Honolulu bondsman James need Dog's help to track down their hard to find fugitives. The two cases on the docket today are challenging, especially the hunt for Gregory, a felon with a lengthy rap sheet.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's feeling lucky, so he's going to try to capture two women in one day. The first, Moani, has "crazy" tattooed on her neck and is facing drug charges. Dog and the team will have to chase her down at the beach if they're going to bring her in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth take on the heartbreaking case of Rachel. Rachel's mom bailed her out of jail on condition that she go to AA meetings and stick to a curfew.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog pursues two people whose lives have been devastated by drugs. First, he tracks Mae, who traded a good home, loving kids, and an adoring husband for an ice pipe. He busts Mae, but is amazed to discover that her family still showers her with love.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The co-signer on this bond is seven months pregnant, and she says that the man she bailed out has threatened her safety and has been running amok on the streets. Now Dog and the posse have got to revoke John's bail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's latest quarry is running from abuse and assault charges. As Dog investigates, he discovers that this fugitive has gamed the system by jumping from one bond, and one bondsman, to another.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is trying to cut down on smoking, but it's not easy with his high-stress job. Today, he must track down Walter, a fugitive who believes that the Canadian military has planted a chip in his tooth.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Christopher is barely 21, already has history of domestic abuse and assault, and now he's facing major time in a room without a view. This hunt won't be easy for Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth designs a luxurious new office for the team and shows it off to Dog, but the bounty hunter is more interested in starting his hunt for Federico, who's been revoked for missing court dates and generally running amuck.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is a big-hearted guy and today he's proving it. He's helping Mary Ellen, his friend and fellow bondsman, on a dangerous night hunt for a fugitive she is now regretting bailing out.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team chase down a bail jumper and he tries to help the criminal turn his life around with words of wisdom.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Beth's birthday and Dog knows just what she needs, whether she knows it or not! He surprises Beth with Delilah, a Papillion puppy small enough to sit in the palm of her hand.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This one is close to home. Dog's target on today's hunt is the cousin of Kali, Garry Boy's caregiver. In addition she has a reputation as a brawler. With Duane Lee still missing from the team Baby Lyssa decides she will step-up in this hunt.

programme.desc: When a child is severely injured by falling in a swimming pool, the man looking after her is arrested.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent?
programme.desc: A young man stabs another man who assaulted his brother and attempted to steal from their family-run gas station.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It?
programme.desc: An unlicensed midwife assists a home birth that ends in tragedy; the Defense believes the midwife took the correct decisions; the Prosecution allege she was inadequately qualified and charge her with Negligent Child Abuse resulting in death.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It?
programme.desc: A husband stumbles from a car and dies in the street after an altercation with his wife spirals out of control; the wife claims she has no memory of wounding him but, when the police investigate, she is charged with second degree murder.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent?
programme.desc: Police reopen the cold case of a young marine who was killed in a hotel room, and they charge the woman who was with him at the time.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent?
programme.desc: When a wife shoots her husband, the investigation reveals their private nightmare; charged with premeditated murder, the wife now faces life in prison, but her defense team argues that she acted in self-defense after experiencing years of abuse.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Stories of those who lead double lives are both daring and baffling. What compels a person to attempt to become someone else?

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Through records in historical texts, oral tradition and folklore, exploring how a once-thriving community becomes a lost city; what secrets found in the ruins reveal about human history.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Despite all of our modern technology, there are aspects of some vanishings that are bizarre and simply can't be explained.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Modern prophets. Catastrophic premonitions. Dreams of future crimes. Can people really predict the future?

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Deadly dances. Masters of manipulation. Mass suicides. Murder. Many of the world's deadliest cults ventured down dark, dangerous rabbit-holes of twisted ideologies.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: What makes us want to create magnificent buildings that are bigger and grander than ourselves--and last for centuries?

programme.title: The UnXplained

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Up to 70% of UFO sightings happen in hot spots; examining what attracts UFOs and extraterrestrial visitors to these locations.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Ancient astronaut theorists suggest the evidence for unidentified aerial phenomena has become too great to ignore and that the truth about an extraterrestrial presence on Earth will soon be revealed.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The towering obelisks of ancient Egypt weigh hundreds of tons; while mainstream scholars identify them as monuments to the pharaohs, ancient astronaut theorists suggest they may have served a technological purpose.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Theorists investigate the mystery of the human genome and ponder the possibility that extraterrestrials aided in the survival of mankind from its earliest days.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Meteor impacts have altered the world, creating the environment for the rise of humankind and delivering metals essential to an advanced civilization; evidence could reveal that celestial objects have been directed to Earth by alien intelligence.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Counting down the top artifacts that could provide evidence that extraterrestrials once walked among us.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The vast Alaskan wilderness is known for mysterious disappearances, electromagnetic anomalies, stories of strange creatures and UFO sightings; Alaska's many mysteries could be due to a presence that is not of this world.

programme.title: American Godfathers: The Five Families
programme.desc: How a more aggressive commitment by law enforcement to eradicate the mafia forces the families to find creative ways to stay in business and out of jail; it's not as easy as it's been in the past and some are willing to throw it all away.

programme.title: Mobsters
programme.desc: The fifth child of 13 children, John Joseph Gotti, Jr. was born October 27, 1940 in the South Bronx. From a very young age, John Gotti made a name for himself.

programme.title: American Godfathers: The Five Families
programme.desc: Follows the American Mafia from their early development in New York City neighborhoods; how public violence, involvement in the drug trade, and appearances at government hearings affect their operations and conflict with their code of honor.

programme.title: American Godfathers: The Five Families
programme.desc: Focusing on the conflict between the families' old guard and a new generation of younger, American-born, mobsters willing to defy the authority of the bosses and the long-established rules in order to fulfill their own ambitions.

programme.title: Panic 9-1-1
programme.desc: The assistant manager of a sporting goods store calls 911 as one of her customers uses an electric saw to cut his way into the store's ammunition and gun rack.

programme.title: Panic 9-1-1
programme.desc: When a young woman, home alone, sees two men crawl over her back fence, she dials 911 and as she begins to beg for help, she hears the sound of glass breaking downstairs.

programme.title: Panic 9-1-1
programme.desc: A taxi driver calls 9-1-1 moments after witnessing her last fare commit a violent crime, but while on the phone, her passenger returns and gets back in her cab!

programme.title: Panic 9-1-1
programme.desc: One part thriller and one part true-crime show, this new series features the real, urgent, unrehearsed, 911 call audio between emergency dispatchers and frantic callers.

programme.title: Panic 9-1-1
programme.desc: A mom and her teenage son barricade themselves inside an upstairs closet with no lock and call 911 as an intruder searchers for their hiding place.

programme.title: Panic 9-1-1
programme.desc: The situations in the this episode are close calls. A pregnant woman in suburban Denver is helpless as she is attacked by her stalker in her secluded home.

programme.desc: This episode begins with a rural California widow calling 911 in the middle of the night as someone tries to break into her home.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In 1977 Florida Nurse Deborah Clark, 23, is found brutally slain in her home.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In August 1972, the body of Jody Loomis is found in the woods. 34 years later, the killer's DNA is recovered from Jody's old clothing but it isn't matched until 2018.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A woman's fall from a cliff in the Grand Canyon leads police to uncover a series of grisly murders, and investigators smoke out a killer when they find crucial DNA evidence.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Investigators in Virginia, probing the murder case of a sailor, seek the help of a forensic anthropologist from the "body farm" in the Great Smoky Mountains.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A mother is suspected in the murders of two of her daughters, when her third daughter finally convinces police to reopen two cold cases.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A highly-regarded California arson investigator is suspected of murder.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Police play a wild hunch that pays off in the capture of a serial rapist. And after 26 years, investigators finally solve the murder of a 6-year-old girl who had been forced to take a cold-water bath as punishment for painting her nails.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
